title: Sizewell C
body: "Sizewell C is a nuclear power station to be built on the Suffolk coast. The government confirmed a final investment decision for the project on 22 July 2025. Once operational it is expected to generate 3.2 GW of electricity, providing power for the equivalent of 6 million of today’s homes.   The final investment decision follows the conclusion of government approvals processes, and negotiations with potential investors as part of the capital raise process started in September 2023.  "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
